_comment_: Source of truth for Solfege PRO subscription pricing per locale. Edit this file when Apple's regional pricing changes; tools/build-langs.js will then propagate the new strings to all source HTML (literal find/replace based on data/prices.previous.json) and regenerate the .en/.fr/.de variants. Use the EXACT visible strings users will see (currency symbol, period word, trial copy). For future automation: a fetch script can overwrite this file from App Store Connect API; no other changes needed.
